reviews.review_description: This has potential, however it's been a few years now with no updates.  Such a shame.

reviews.review_title: How do you get on the rides?
reviews.review_description: The app looks nice but I'm not seeing how I can get on the rides.

💖I love your game FunnyLand alot my dear friends.💖There is a little problem with the ride seats not lining up.💖Some times the seat will line up and sometimes they won't.💖But I found out that if you move your swivel chair a bit. You can line up the seats by your self.💖My dear friends I am hoping that you will be getting a ride though dark ride.💖Ride though dark rides are my favorite.💖I love all the rides in your park.💖I love how all of your rides give you the feeling and sensation that you are really on them.💖God bless you all.💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖

Excellent so far, the rides work very well. 
Sometimes you don’t line up with the seat properly on rides. It could do with a seated play option, so that you’re standing when walking around and a sitting position on rides. Also need a smooth turning option.
